case_title: RICHARD DERUS et al VS. CAROL HUBER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERUS, RICHARD DERUS, MARIA
